{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Sandviper woman
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Soulsmith (novel)|Soulsmith]]
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|A [[Sandviper woman]] with a [[sword]] is one of the guards.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c14">''Soulsmith'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
